option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
*.iml .gradle /local.properties /.idea/caches /.idea/libraries /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml .DS_Store /build /captures .externalNativeBuild .cxx local.properties
# Copilot local metadata /.idea/*copilot*
# Firebase local config /app/google-services.json

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_placeholder" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.BodyMedium" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_subtitle" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.BodyMedium" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_location_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_location_hint" android:inputType="textCapWords" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_period_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_period_hint" android:inputType="textCapWords" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_description_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_description_hint" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_how_to_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_how_to_hint" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
<Button android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_publish_button" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_publish" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
